free_text:
**UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES — 2020 FINANCIAL DISCLOSURE STATEMENT (Form A)** — For Use by Members, Officers, and Employees

- Name: Rohit Khanna
- Daytime Telephone: 202-225-2631
- FILER STATUS: [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17
- REPORT TYPE: [ ] 2020 Annual (Due: May 17, 2021)  |  [X] **Amendment**  |  [ ] Termination (Date of Termination: blank)
- Filing stamp: HAND DELIVERED — Legislative Resource Center, 2021 DEC 22 PM (time partly illegible), Office of the Clerk, U.S. House of Representatives. "$200 penalty shall be assessed against any individual who files more than 30 days late."

**PRELIMINARY INFORMATION**
- A. Own any reportable asset >$1,000 at end of period, or receive >$200 unearned income from any reportable asset? **Yes [X]**  No [ ]
- B. Purchase, sell, or exchange any securities or reportable real estate in a transaction exceeding $1,000? **Yes [X]**  No [ ]
- C. Earned income (salaries, honoraria, pension/IRA) of $200 or more? Yes [ ]  **No [X]**
- D. Any reportable liability (>$10,000) at any point during the reporting period? **Yes [X]**  No [ ]
- E. Hold any reportable positions during the reporting period or current year up through date of filing? **Yes [X]**  No [ ]
- F. Any reportable agreement or arrangement with an outside entity? Yes [ ]  **No [X]**
- G. Receive any reportable gift(s) totaling more than $415 from a single source? Yes [ ]  **No [X]**
- H. Receive any reportable travel/reimbursements for travel totaling more than $415 from a single source? Yes [ ]  **No [X]**
- I. Did any individual/organization make a donation to charity in lieu of paying you for a speech/appearance/article? Yes [ ]  **No [X]**

**IPO AND EXCLUSION OF SPOUSE, DEPENDENT, OR TRUST INFORMATION**
- IPO — Purchase any shares allocated as part of an Initial Public Offering? Yes [ ]  **No [X]**
- TRUSTS — Excluded details of a Qualified Blind Trust / excepted trust? Yes [ ]  **No [X]**
- EXEMPTION — Excluded any other assets/income/transactions/liabilities of spouse or dependent child meeting all three tests? Yes [ ]  **No [X]**

NOTE: This is a Form A **AMENDMENT** (Amendment box checked). Handwritten "ML" annotation and a checkmark appear near the filing stamp.

uncertainties.note: hour/minute of the received stamp overprinted by 'For Official Use Only' text and illegible
